name: Crunch Bars
recipeInstructions:
Cream the shortening and sugar until smooth. Add the eggs and vanilla; mix well. Stir in the flour, baking powder, and salt. Spread evenly in a greased 9 x 13 inch pan. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 to 20 minutes. Remove from the oven and distribute marshmallows over the crust. Return to the oven briefly. Let cool for 30 minutes. Melt the chocolate chips and peanut butter, then stir into the cereal mixture before spreading on bars.
Browns Valley
busted by sooz
